_comment: PLACEHOLDER — NOT A REAL FIREBASE CONFIG FILE. This file must be replaced with the real google-services.json downloaded from your Firebase Console (Project Settings > Your apps > Android app, package name com.cnglive.app) OR generated automatically by running `flutterfire configure`. The com.google.gms.google-services Gradle plugin (already wired in settings.gradle and app/build.gradle) will fail the build with a clear error if this placeholder is still in place when you build.
